description.full: A sample bot that demonstrates how to send targeted messages that are only visible to specific recipients in Microsoft Teams.

commands.title: test send
commands.description: Send a targeted message visible only to you

commands.title: test update
commands.description: Send a targeted message then update it after 3 seconds

commands.title: test delete
commands.description: Send a targeted message then delete it after 3 seconds

commands.title: test public
commands.description: Send a public message visible to everyone

commands.title: test inbound
commands.description: Show whether the inbound message was targeted at the bot
